title: Collapse Agenda in Monday Docs
excerpt: Our team has recently started using Monday Docs for our various meeting agendas, and we love it! Makes it much easier to have the relevant boards embedded in your doc than having to jump from Google Doc to Monday.com con…

posts.author: 33Harlow (Kris Harlow)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our team has recently started using Monday Docs for our various meeting agendas, and we love it! Makes it much easier to have the relevant boards embedded in your doc than having to jump from Google Doc to Monday.com constantly.

I was curious if it’d be possible to implement some sort of collapsible feature that would allow for previous agenda minutes, topics, etc. to be condensed within the doc. Example: Running Agenda has a header for each week’s minutes. Those minutes are important to keep as a reference, but do not necessarily need to be fully viewable at all times. Being able to establish a header over a bulleted agenda and then collapse those bullets as needed would make for a great tool!

posts.author: PM_Karen (Karen H)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see this feature! Has it happened yet?

posts.author: Liz-M (Lisette Meilof)
posts.cookedHtml: Would also really love this. Don’t think it has happened yet. Hoping it will soon!

posts.author: PM_Karen (Karen H)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love this too. I rely heavily on Monday Docs to track reoccurring meeting notes. It would be useful to be able to collapse sections, so I don’t have to scroll through all of the notes when looking for a specific meeting date.

posts.author: lthelen (Louis Thelen)
posts.cookedHtml: Voted on this, having the ability to Expand and collapse headings would be Awesome. I keep a running document of Meeting Minutes as well and I Like to use the presentation mode in Notes and would love to ability to collapse past meeting minute to clean up the view, and expand them when we need to reference pas discussion items.

posts.author: Joe_Downey (Joe Downey)
posts.cookedHtml:
This feature would be beyond helpful. Is this up for consideration, or other improvements to Workdocs such as multiple pages? Is there a roadmap for Workdocs?

@monday-team @CSG

posts.author: dlf293 (Danielle Feder)
posts.cookedHtml: Literally just joined this community to submit this exact feature request! Would LOVE to be able to toggle headings and lists to expand/collapse them!

posts.author: toast (Trevor Croteau)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, please! This would be very helpful for my organization as well for general documentation as Monday Docs get long and busy very quickly. To me, it is important that collapsible sections default as collapsed when a user navigates to the page so I can ensure their focus remains on the important bits.

@monday-team

posts.author: carlybmp (Carly H.)
posts.cookedHtml: 1000% would love this to be a feature

posts.author: krakotoarivelo (Rakotoarivelo)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be an extremely helpful for feature, also for collapsing steps in SOPs, etc, so they’re easier to skim through, and then the additional info could just be expanded as needed.

posts.author: Andoni00 (Andoni)
posts.cookedHtml: Have upvoted but wanted to also comment to bump this up as it would be extremely helpful, similar to existing features in other apps like Microsoft Office SharePoint. It is quite handy to use a Doc as an additional view to keep track of live documents in one place, but it can become unwieldy if sections are not shown as collapsed by default.
